title: clematis gouriana
intro: Clematis gouriana, also known as Clematis gouriana, is a flowering vine native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Clematis gouriana include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an anti-asthmatic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, Clematis gouriana is often used in the form of a decoction, powder, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
